title: Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd!
